author: Abhay Anand
name: Reproduction of SOTA #1: Int6 MLP3x SmearGate BigramHash MuonWD SWA
blurb: Non-record reproduction of the March 20 SOTA submission on RunPod 8xH100 SXM. Verified reproducibility of SmearGate + BigramHash + int6 QAT + 3x MLP + Muon WD + SWA approach. Achieved 1.1455 val_bpb matching published 1.1458.
